text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Traceeen! Academyyy! Cheer Squad!

text_block_list.name: Cheer Squad
text_block_list.text: Osu!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
We, the Tracen Cheer Squad, have formed for the upcoming Spring
Fan Fest!

text_block_list.name: Cheer Squad
text_block_list.text: Osu!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Our sworn duty: to cheer on the Umamusume who will run in the
competition and boost everyone's morale!

text_block_list.name: Cheer Squad
text_block_list.text: Osu!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: And to that end...

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
We will be sporting a new, high-performance costume! It supports
abdominal breathing! It even has a built-in microphone!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Whoa... Wh-whaaaaa?!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Ohohoho! Great surprise, isn't it? I'm glad I kept it secret until the big
reveal!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
I wish you hadn't, then at least I could've stopped you! And please,
what have you got Pearl doing?!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Much like fireworks or a disco ball, things that sparkle lift people's
spirits! Besides, isn't it glorious? It's like this costume was made for
Pearl.

text_block_list.name: Seeking the Pearl
text_block_list.text: Gooo fooor iiit. ♪

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: I have no idea what's going on anymore...

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
WHY YOUUU! KING HALOOO! Was it you who messed with the
school speaker settings?!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
A complaint came in to the disciplinary committee. The speakers
suddenly stopped working, then some weird singing... wait, what's
going on here?!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Agh! I didn't think the disciplinary committee would sniff us out this
fast! Cheer Squad! Time out! Retreeeat!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Ugh... What have I gotten myself into? This is way too chaotic...

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
So, basically... Tracen Cheer Squad is a temporary team formed in the
lead-up to the Spring Fan Fest.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Fan Fests are held twice a year, one in spring and one in fall. The
Spring Fan Fest is a sports day, while the Fall Fan Fest is a cultural
day.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
In the Spring Fan Fest, students from all over the academy gather to
take part in contests and events to entertain their fans.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Every year, a Cheer Squad is formed to liven up the event, and this
time it's King who's in charge. Joining her are Pearl and I, along with
the rest of the squad.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Right, Pearl?

text_block_list.name: Seeking the Pearl
text_block_list.text: That's right! Nice one, Nature. You summed everything up perfectly!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Then can you do me a favor and try not to make things crazier than they already are? You know King will go overboard if you give her the chance.

text_block_list.name: Seeking the Pearl
text_block_list.text:
Oh? But why? I don't think her ideas are bad at all. Her way of
thinking is—

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: BOOM, CHA CHA! CHIKI CHIKI CHA! BOOM TA TA! CHA CHA!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Ngh?! Where's all this rowdy music coming from? I hope this isn't what
I think it is...

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: ...you think? On the... drums... whistles...

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Aghhh...

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: Wh-what's going on here?! Who's responsible for this racket?!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Later this week, we'll be performing a special practice session for
visitors from outside the academy, so I get why she's pulling out all
the stops, but still...

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
The weird costume, the live music... She even made giant party
crackers... Ahhh, why is she making everything so flashy?

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Even if I asked her what she was thinking, I don't think she'd give me
a straight answer.

text_block_list.name: Seeking the Pearl
text_block_list.text: I hear you'd like some answers?!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Waaah! Pearl?! You almost gave me a heart attack...

text_block_list.name: Seeking the Pearl
text_block_list.text:
Sorry, I heard the voice of a lost child and my body moved before I
could even think about it.

text_block_list.name: Seeking the Pearl
text_block_list.text: Anyway, about King. It all started one month ago, as far as I know.

text_block_list.name: Seeking the Pearl
text_block_list.text:
It was the day that sign-ups started for the Fan Fest competitions.
That's when King...
